decks.notes: The main goal of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty to overwhelm the opponent. Utilizing cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Faithless Looting to quickly fill the graveyard and then bring back creatures with cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. Control elements like Thoughtseize, Unmask, and Cabal Therapy help disrupt the opponent's game plan while also fueling the reanimation strategy. The deck aims to win through explosive plays and overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures early in the game.

The deck focuses on quickly getting out a powerful creature like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn or Atraxa, Grand Unifier using cards like Show and Tell, Sneak Attack, and Omniscience. It also includes counter spells like Force of Will and Spell Pierce to protect your combo pieces. The deck can generate mana quickly with cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb, and can filter through the deck with Brainstorm and Ponder. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and win the game in a few turns.

The main concept of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with fast and powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer. The deck utilizes mana acceleration with cards like Lotus Petal and Grim Monolith to cast these threats ahead of schedule. Chalice of the Void is used to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Wastescape Battlemage and Kozilek's Command provide additional utility and removal. The deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain board control to secure victory in the Legacy format.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures such as Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty to overwhelm the opponent with high-impact threats. By utilizing cards like Shallow Grave, Animate Dead, and Reanimate in combination with efficient mana acceleration from Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual, this deck aims to cheat expensive creatures into play ahead of curve. Cards like Faithless Looting, Unmask, and Thoughtseize help to dig for combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes some versatile threats like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Koma, World-Eater for additional pressure.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board and generate value through ramp and powerful creature threats. By utilizing cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Natural Order, the deck aims to quickly ramp into threats like Craterhoof Behemoth or Atraxa, Grand Unifier, while also disrupting the opponent with cards like Endurance and Collector Ouphe. The inclusion of cards like Gaea's Cradle and Wasteland allow the deck to generate additional mana and disrupt the opponent's mana base, further establishing control over the game.

The primary focus of this deck is to control the game through the manipulation and utilization of lands. By using cards like Crop Rotation, Life from the Loam, and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Wasteland and Pithing Needle. The combo of Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage is a key win condition, allowing the player to quickly generate a powerful 20/20 creature. Overall, the deck seeks to overpower the opponent through strategic land management and disruptive control elements.

The deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive playstyle with creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ocelot Pride. It utilizes disruptive spells like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also has a sacrifice theme with cards like Goblin Bombardment and Cabal Therapy to get value from sacrificing creatures. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy with a mix of fetch lands and dual lands, while also including utility lands like Karakas for protection.

The deck revolves around the Combo -Storm strategy, using cards like Dark Ritual, Lion's Eye Diamond, and Infernal Tutor to generate mana quickly and build up a storm count. The goal is to cast a high-impact spell like Tendrils of Agony to finish off the opponent in one big turn. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Duress and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's game plan while searching for key combo pieces. The inclusion of Wishclaw Talisman and Burning Wish provides additional flexibility and tutoring capabilities to find the right cards at the right time.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively utilize artifact creatures and artifacts to overwhelm opponents quickly. By using synergistic cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga, along with mana acceleration from cards like Lotus Petal and Mox Opal, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on. Chalice of the Void and Force of Will help control the opponent's spells, while cards like Shadowspear provide additional utility. The deck focuses on speed and efficiency to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in a Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

Utilize efficient creatures and disruptive spells to control the tempo of the game, while also applying pressure to the opponent. This deck aims to quickly deploy threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent while protecting them with counter spells like Force of Will and Daze. Additionally, removal spells like Fatal Push and Sheoldred's Edict help to maintain board control. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage, while Flow State offers an alternate win condition. The mana base is optimized for consistency and mana denial with cards like Wasteland.

The main strategy of this deck revolves around assembling the Doomsday combo, using cards like Lotus Petal, Dark Ritual, and Force of Will to quickly set up a win condition with Thassa's Oracle or Jace, Wielder of Mysteries. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Daze to control the game and protect the combo. With a focus on efficient and powerful spells, this deck aims to create a winning board state in just a few turns, utilizing the Doomsday card to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing lands as a resource to control the game, through cards like Crop Rotation, Life from the Loam, and Exploration. The goal is to assemble powerful land combinations such as Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create strong threats, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Wasteland and The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale. By manipulating lands and utilizing key artifacts like The One Ring and Pithing Needle, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent in a long game of attrition.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using lands like Ancient Tomb, City of Traitors, and various other lands, in order to play high casting cost creatures such as Apex Devastator, Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, and Maelstrom Wanderer. Once enough mana is generated, players can use cards like Creative Technique to dig for crucial combo pieces and overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures. The deck aims to disrupt opponents quickly and efficiently while establishing a formidable board presence to secure victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Archon of Cruelty, then bring them back into play using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. This allows the deck to create explosive turns and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board state. The deck also includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo pieces and stop the opponent's game plan. The combination of reanimation spells, card selection, and disruption makes the deck a potent threat in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly cheat big, powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Archon of Cruelty into play using cards like Show and Tell, Sneak Attack, and Omniscience. These creatures have game-changing abilities and can quickly close out games once they hit the battlefield. The deck also includes ways to protect your combo pieces with cards like Force of Will and Spell Pierce, as well as ways to dig for them with cards like Brainstorm and Ponder. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with massive threats and win the game before they have a chance to respond.

The deck focuses on locking down the opponent using artifacts like Trinisphere and Candelabra of Tawnos, while also ramping up mana quickly with cards like Grim Monolith and Cityscape Leveler. The goal is to control the game with powerful artifacts like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms, while using disruptive cards like Disruptor Flute and Kozilek's Command to stall the opponent. The deck also has a strong late-game threat with Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, making it difficult for the opponent to recover once the lock is in place.
